kcap-review.description: PR review context tools — query implementation session transcripts to understand why code was changed. Pass the target PR as a `pr` argument to each tool (e.g. 'owner/repo#123' or a github.com URL) or run from a branch with an open PR for auto-detection.

kcap-flows.description: Structured AI review flows — start_review_flow, submit_review_round, get_review_flow_status, close_review_flow. Launches a hosted reviewer agent through your daemon; requires `kcap login` and a running daemon with this repo checked out (the tools are inert otherwise).
